The '''7th Legion''' was a [[Legion/Legends|legion]] of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] under the command of [[Senior clone commander|Senior Clone Commander]] [[A'den]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. The 7th Legion was part of the [[327th Star Corps/Legends|327th Star Corps]], led by [[Clone Marshal Commander/Legends|Clone Marshal Commander]] [[Bly/Legends|Bly]] and [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]]. The [[101st Regiment]] was part of the 7th Legion,<ref name="GAR Guide" /> as was the [[3rd Brigade]].<ref name="GentleGiant" />

[[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone Commander]] [[Faie/Legends|Faie]] was attached to the 7th Legion, and participated in the [[Siege of Saleucami/Legends|Siege of Saleucami]] alongside Commander Bly, General Secura, and other members of the overall 327th.<ref name="Republic 74" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:7th_Legion_Clone_Trooper.jpg|thumb|right|136px|The promotional 7th Legion action figure.]]
An action figure of a Clone trooper of the 7th Legion was released.
